---
title: "Understanding Graph Machine Learning Models through Replication and Parameter Exploration"
sidebar: projects
---

## Table of Contents

| Section | Title | Tags |
| ------- | ----- | ---- |
| 0 | [Replicating a Simple GNN on Cora](replicating-a-simple-gnn-on-cora.qmd) | `#GNN` `#Cora` |
